input_ports.name: ROS_burden_score
input_ports.description: Upstream ROS burden from biotransformation module

input_ports.name: GSH_pool_fraction
input_ports.description: Current GSH pool fraction from interaction module

output_ports.name: ROS_burden
output_ports.description: Aggregate ROS score from all pathway-activating agents

output_ports.name: oxidative_adduct_score
output_ports.description: Score for 8-OHdG, Oxo_dG-type adducts predicted from ROS level

output_ports.name: repair_capacity_index
output_ports.description: 0-1 index representing DNA repair enzyme availability

update_rule: ROS_burden = Σ(metal_exposure[m] × indirect_genotoxicity_score[m]) + GSH_depleted_fraction × ROS_amplification_factor;  oxidative_adduct_score = ROS_burden × repair_susceptibility;  repair_capacity_index = min(1.0, OGG1_activity + XRCC1_activity + ERCC2_activity) — reduced by GSH depletion and metal inhibition;  PARP1 activated when SSB_rate > threshold

parameters.name: Cd_ROS_generation
parameters.notes: Cd inhibits NER; displaces Zn in repair enzymes; indirect ROS via MT depletion at high doses

parameters.name: CrVI_ROS_generation
parameters.mechanism: Fenton-like; Cr(VI)→Cr(V)→Cr(III) reduction cycle generates ROS
parameters.notes: 3 GSH consumed per Cr(VI); generates •OH via Fenton-like reaction

parameters.name: Ni_ROS_generation
parameters.mechanism: Ni²⁺ displaces Fe²⁺ in Fenton reaction; also inhibits PARP

parameters.name: MMA_III_ROS_generation
parameters.mechanism: Trivalent monomethyl arsenic generates ROS more efficiently than inorganic arsenate

parameters.name: XRCC1_BER_coordination
parameters.mechanism: BER scaffold; coordinates PARP1, DNA polymerase β, LIG3

evidence_bundle.note: CrVI, Cd, Ni oxidative stress mechanisms
Indirect genotoxicity model for heavy metals
DNA repair enzyme to adduct mapping

uncertainty.notes: Quantitative ROS burden parameters absent from JSON sources; qualitative basis used. equation_type=rule-based appropriate. Metal indirect genotoxicity is modeled as score-based approximation.
uncertainty.context_sensitivity: ROS burden is strongly tissue and dose dependent; non-linear GSH depletion dynamics

notes: CONFORMANT: all interface required_fields present; all port dtypes resolve; all interface port-type contracts satisfied.
